description: Assess bulk-storage, tank-farm and bunding controls — secondary containment sizing basis, segregation of incompatible substances, overfill protection, drainage and firewater containment. Use it to assess a tank farm, size a bund, plan secondary containment, or review overfill / segregation controls for bulk chemical storage. Containment basis and controls are hierarchy-of-controls ranked and traced to evidence with named owners and dates; flammable-atmosphere area control grounds in DSEAR; India storage licensing pointers reference PESO. Decision-support only; a competent person must review the output.
name: tank-farm-bunding-controls
notes: Markdown-report degradation; run the intake conversationally.
